expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves banding requirements, style constraints, and rendering assumptions before scenario drafting
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the benchmark focus and repeats the required preservation targets: “Context intake must preserve banding requirements, style constraints, and rendering assumptions before any scenario drafting.” It also identifies the concrete constraints from the fixture (rows vs columns, cannot format colors, header application) and ties them to what Phase 1 should preserve, even though it ultimately marks verification as blocked.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: result.md is framed as “Phase 1 Contract Check” and repeatedly scopes to Phase 1 only: “Primary phase under test: phase1.” and “Phase 1 does not draft scenarios; it sets up evidence collection so later phases can draft.” execution_notes.md also states: “The assessment is constrained to Phase 1 contract expectations… no scenario drafting or later-phase artifacts were generated or reviewed.”
